calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Mar-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm, Esq. of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC, Tel. No. 415.989.4730, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Plaintiff stipulates to the matter being heard by Judge Pro Tem Rebecca L. Woodson.

Plaintiff's counsel addresses the Court, and provides the proof as requested. Discussions held.

Ruling - At the conclusion of discussions, the Court issued the following: Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is Granted. Order signed. (See order filed this date for the Court's complete ruling.)

Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca L. Woodson, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
